TIER 1 DARK 30

When the Grid Goes Down

Operator-grade survival and preparedness training. 225+ modules. Fully offline. One price. No subscription.

DOWNLOAD ON APP STORE GOOGLE PLAY — COMING SOON

iOS • Android (Coming Soon) • $24.99 One-Time • No Subscription

MOST PEOPLE WILL NOT BE READY

72 HOURS

Average grocery store inventory. After that the shelves are empty.

3 DAYS

Before most households run out of water without municipal supply.

0 PLANS

Percentage of Americans with a documented grid-down survival plan.

Power outages. Supply chain collapse. Civil unrest. Government breakdown. Natural disaster. EMP. Pandemic. These are not conspiracy theories. They are documented historical events that happen to real people in real places. The question is not whether you will face a crisis. It is whether you will be ready.

WHAT'S INSIDE

SCENARIOS

83 Scenario Modules

Grid Collapse. Civil Unrest. Government Breakdown. Invasion. Nuclear. Biological. Chemical. Natural Disaster. Full operational playbooks — not Wikipedia summaries.

SKILLS

114 Skill Modules

Fire. Shelter. Water. Medical. Navigation. Food. Communications. Security. Intel. Movement. Weapons. Improvised Tools. Situational Awareness. Community. Written to operator standard.

TOOLS

Live Operator Tools

Water and food calculator. Comms planner with PACE card builder. Gear loadout builder with readiness scoring. Offline compass with MGRS. Power reference.

SIGNAL SUITE

Full Signal Suite

Morse flasher using your phone LED. Manual tap decoder. Sound signal generator. Visual signal reference. COMSEC discipline guide. Works with zero network connection.

ASSESSMENT

Situation Assessment Engine

8-question tactical intake. Generates a prioritized action plan specific to your threat, location, group, and resources.

REFERENCE

21 Reference Cards

Trauma first aid. Water treatment. Nuclear shelter. KI dosing. Radiation. Chemical agents. Navigation. Fire. Weather. Screenshot them. They work without the app.

OFFLINE FIRST. ALWAYS.

✓ Zero internet required — works in airplane mode
✓ Zero accounts — no sign up, no login, no profile
✓ Zero tracking — no analytics, no data collection, no telemetry
✓ Zero subscription — one price, own it forever, all updates included

THIS APP WORKS WHEN EVERYTHING ELSE DOESN'T
